details.test: Task 1: Purchase main domain one-time with credit card
Task 2: Cheapest lease plan under 150 and start lease checkout
Task 3: Main domain + shortest similar .com under 3000 via cart
Task 4: Submit negotiated offer based on Buy Now price
Task 5: Cycle price view through USD, EUR, GBP
Task 6: FAQ exploration and contact support from FAQ
Task 7: Subscribe to alerts with budget and two categories
Task 8: Request phone call from seller with budget and timeline
Task 9: Portfolio filter + lease checkout with monthly < 200
